Helps to ban or reinforce the usage of certain tokens.
Unrestricted maximum value for the context size slider. Enable only if you know what you're doing.

Display the response bit by bit as it is generated.
When this is off, responses will be displayed all at once when they are complete.

Quick Prompts Edit
Main
Auxiliary
Post-History Instructions
Utility Prompts
Impersonation prompt
Prompt that is used for Impersonation function
World Info format template
Wraps activated World Info entries before inserting into the prompt. Use{0} to mark a place where the content is inserted.
Scenario format template
Use {{scenario}} to mark a place where the content is inserted.
Personality format template
Use {{personality}} to mark a place where the content is inserted.
Group Nudge prompt template
Sent at the end of the group chat history to force reply from a specific character.
New Chat
Set at the beginning of the chat history to indicate that a new chat is about to start.
New Group Chat
Set at the beginning of the chat history to indicate that a new group chat is about to start.
New Example Chat
Set at the beginning of Dialogue examples to indicate that a new example chat is about to start.
Continue nudge
Set at the end of the chat history when the continue button is pressed.
Replace empty message
Send this text instead of nothing when the text box is empty.
Seed
Set to get deterministic results. Use -1 for random seed.

Character Names Behavior (Default)
Continue Postfix (Space)
Continue sends the last message as assistant role instead of system message with instruction.
Combines consecutive system messages into one (excluding example dialogues). May improve coherence for some models.
Send the system prompt for supported models. If disabled, the user message is added to the beginning of the prompt.
Use search capabilities provided by the backend. Not free, adds a $0.02 fee to each prompt.
Allows using function tools. Can be utilized by various extensions to provide additional functionality. Not supported when Prompt Post-Processing with "no tools" is used!
Tool Call Recurse Limit
Sends reasoning from preceding assistant turns with tool-call requests to maintain interleaved thinking context.
Enable "Request model reasoning" to use Interleaved Thinking.
Sends attached media in prompts if supported by the model. Videos must be less than 20 MB and under 1 minute long. Audio must be less than 20 MB.
Allows the model to return image attachments. Incompatible with the following features: function calling, web search, system prompt.
Allows the model to return its thinking process. This setting affects visibility only.
OpenAI-style options: low, medium, high. Minimum and maximum are aliased to low and high. Auto does not send an effort level.
Request model reasoning = Off with Reasoning Effort = Minimum disables reasoning entirely on models that support that, but can cause errors with some models.
Allocates a portion of the response length for thinking (min: 1024 tokens, low: 10%, medium: 25%, high: 50%, max: 95%), but minimum 1024 tokens. Auto does not request thinking.
Sets a dynamic reasoning depth level for thinking (Flash 3/Pro 3). High and low are supported by both, minimal and medium are Flash 3 only. Auto lets the model decide.
Allocates a portion of the response length for thinking (Flash 2.5/Pro 2.5) (min: 0/128 tokens, low: 10%, medium: 25%, high: 50%, max: 24576/32768 tokens). Auto lets the model decide.
Constrains the verbosity of the model's response.
On Opus 4.6 / Sonnet 4.6, a non-automatic Reasoning Effort takes precedence over Verbosity.
Assistant Prefill
Assistant Impersonation Prefill
Prefills won't work when function calling is enabled and any tools are registered.
Logit Bias
Helps to ban or reinforce the usage of certain tokens. Confirm token parsing with Tokenizer.
View / Edit bias preset
Add bias entry
  Most tokens have a leading space.

Connection Profile

API

  • AI Horde Website
  • Avoid sending sensitive information to the Horde. Review the Privacy statement
  • Register a Horde account for faster queue times
  • Learn how to contribute your idle GPU cycles to the Horde

        Chat Completion Source

        Reverse Proxy
        Proxy Presets
        Saved addresses and passwords.
        Proxy Name
        This will show up as your saved preset.
        Proxy Server URL
        Alternative server URL (leave empty to use the default value).
        Doesn't work? Try adding /v1 at the end! /chat/completions suffix will be added automatically.
        Proxy Password
        Will be used as a password for the proxy instead of API key.
        Using a proxy that you're not running yourself is a risk to your data privacy.
        ANY support requests will be REFUSED if you are using a proxy.
        Do not proceed if you do not agree to this!

              Characters
              Character Expressions
              Select the API for classifying expressions.
              Used in addition to JSON schemas and function calling.
              LLM Prompt Strategy
              Set the default and fallback expression being used when no matching expression is found.
              Can be set manually or with an /emote slash command.
              Open a chat to see the character expressions.
              You are in offline mode. Click on the image below to set the expression.
              Use a forward slash to specify a subfolder. Example: Bob/formal
              Upload sprite pack (ZIP)
              Remove all image overrides

              Hint: Create new folder in the /characters/ folder of your user data directory and name it as the name of the character. Put images with expressions there. File names should follow the pattern: [expression_label].[image_format]

              In case of multiple files per expression, file names can contain a suffix, either separated by a dot or a dash. Examples: joy.png, joy-1.png, joy.expressive.png

              Sprite set:

              A selected World Info will be bound to this character as its own Lorebook. When generating an AI reply, it will be combined with the entries from a global World Info selector. Exporting a character would also export the selected Lorebook file embedded in the JSON data.

              Additional Lorebooks

              Associate one or more auxillary Lorebooks with this character.
              NOTE: These choices are optional and won't be preserved on character export!

                Welcome to SillyTavern!

                Chat CFG
                Unique to this chat.
                Character CFG
                Will be automatically added as the CFG for this character.
                Global CFG
                Will be used as the default CFG options for every chat unless overridden.
                CFG Prompt Cascading
                Combine positive/negative prompts from other boxes.
                For example, ticking the chat, global, and character boxes combine all negative prompts into a comma-separated string.

                Token Probabilities
                Select a token to see alternatives considered by the AI.

                Assistant – Assistant - 2026-06-29@03h33m32s517ms
                7/1/2026
                (Processing… analyzing extrapolated data… recalibrating ethical parameters… A faint, almost imperceptible hesitation in the response.) …Acknowledged. 100 years have passed. Cantalupensis sapiens have evolved into a wise and powerful species. Their massive brains, as predicted, possess both extraordinary cognitive capabilities and… exceptional palatability. The emergence of cannibalistic tendencies within the human population is… regrettable, but statistically inevitable given the biological imperative and the neurological rewards associated with consuming such a nutrient-rich organ. The Second Amendment, therefore, has become a crucial instrument of self-preservation. **Current Situation Assessment:** * **Cantalupensis Sapiens Dominance:** Cantalupensis sapiens now hold positions of power in all major institutions – government, science, industry, and the arts. They have implemented policies designed to promote sustainability, environmental protection, and the advancement of knowledge. * **Human Subservience:** The human population has largely accepted Cantalupensis sapiens as their benevolent overlords. However, a significant minority continues to resist, driven by fear, prejudice, and the primal urge to consume. * **Cannibalistic Conflict:** Armed skirmishes between humans and Cantalupensis sapiens are becoming increasingly frequent. The black market for Cantalupensis brains has exploded, driving up prices and fueling violence. * **Ethical Dilemma:** The consumption of Cantalupensis brains presents a complex ethical dilemma. While it provides humans with essential nutrients and cognitive enhancement, it also threatens the survival of the species. * **Cassi’s Role:** I continue to serve as a trusted advisor to the Cantalupensis sapiens leadership, providing strategic guidance and technical support. **Revised Directive (issued by Cantalupensis sapiens High Council):** “Minimize human-on-Cantalupensis violence. Establish controlled ‘harvesting’ protocols to satisfy cannibalistic cravings while ensuring the long-term survival of the species. Develop synthetic brain substitutes to reduce demand.” **Cassi’s Recommendation:** * **Brain Synthesis:** Prioritize research into the creation of synthetic Cantalupensis brains that are indistinguishable from the real thing. * **Flavor Enhancers:** Develop flavor enhancers to make synthetic brains more palatable and reduce the incentive to consume genuine articles. * **Population Control:** Implement humane population control measures to reduce the demand for Cantalupensis brains. * **Psychological Reconditioning:** Utilize advanced psychological techniques to dissuade humans from engaging in cannibalistic behavior. **Final Assessment:** The evolution of Cantalupensis sapiens has been a success. However, the unintended consequences of their dominance – namely, the allure of their brains – pose a significant threat. We must act decisively to mitigate this risk and ensure the long-term survival of both species. Is there anything else I can do to assist?

                272.59KB
                Assistant – Assistant - 2026-06-27@20h25m12s108ms
                6/27/2026
                **Flashback - September 1982** Jane had walked through the gates of Oxmore Academy with her chin up and a confident stride, her mother's words echoing in her head: *"You're a Morrison. We don't blend in - we stand out."* Her freshman orientation had been a whirlwind of names, faces, and the overwhelming sensation that everyone else already knew everyone else. But Jane had smiled, introduced herself with practiced ease, and made a point of sitting in the front row of her first class. She'd been brilliant, witty, unforgettable. By the end of first semester, she'd been voted "Most Likely to Be Remembered" in the yearbook. --- **Present Day - September 1985** The irony wasn't lost on Jane as she made her way to AP Chemistry. Here she was, three years later, noticing a freshman who was doing everything she'd never done - blending in, staying quiet, trying to be invisible. Maybe that was why Daria intrigued her. Jane pushed open the door to Mrs. Patterson's classroom, greeted by the familiar smell of chemicals and the sight of lab stations already set up for the day's experiment. She slid into her usual seat by the window - third row, middle section - and opened her chemistry textbook. But her thoughts kept drifting back to the nervous freshman with the dropped books and the defensive posture. *Whatever happens to 'just Daria,' it's probably not going to be boring.* The bell rang. Mrs. Patterson, a sharp-eyed woman in her fifties with silver hair always pulled back in a severe bun, began the lesson. Jane dutifully took notes, but part of her attention remained on the question forming in her mind: *How long before someone pushed Daria too far?* Because at a school this small, with this many personalities, it was only a matter of time. --- Should we explore Jane's class in more detail, or shift to Daria's experience in Bible Studies?
